chunks.text: Stavros Tripakis Aalto.fi sci.aalto.fi cs.aalto.fi Home Group Teaching Publications Events Contact RCRS Stavros Tripakis Professor NEWS: I have joined Northeastern University ! I am interested in the foundations of system design. My research currentl

foundations of system design. My research currently focuses on formal methods, computer-aided verification and synthesis, system modeling and simulation, and compositionality. My work involves developing theory and building tools for designing better

ing theory and building tools for designing better (and better designing) systems. Application domains include safety-critical systems, embedded systems, and cyber-physical systems. I joined Aalto in August 2012. My h-index is 45 : Google Scholar pa

August 2012. My h-index is 45 : Google Scholar page . Our group is working, among other things, on the Refinement Calculus of Reactive Systems (RCRS) . The RCRS Toolset won a Distinguished Artifact Award at TACAS 2018 . Recent papers: 2018: Data-dri

ward at TACAS 2018 . Recent papers: 2018: Data-driven and Model-based Design . 2018: The Refinement Calculus of Reactive Systems Toolset (open access link). 2017: Automatic Synthesis of Distributed Protocols . 2016: Compositionality in the Science of
otocols . 2016: Compositionality in the Science of System Design . Latest update 2019-01-27 04:18 EET Maintained by Stavros Tripakis
